creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Really? Too bad that I did not see that. Hence, I suggest that
irc/ezbounce-devel is either removed or it is updated to an even newer
development version. Otherwise portscout remains complaining about a new
version available for irc/ezbounce...




On Fri, 09 Jul 2010 12:59:35 +0200, Florian Smeets <flo@kasimir.com>
wrote:
> Version 1.99.15 is available as irc/ezbounce-devel.
> 
> Cheers,
> Florian
